summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard with entity management, entry log, and linked flows. All backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend UI functional with minor overlay interaction issues in dropdowns.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay intercepts pointer events preventing direct option clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Use keyboard navigation or force=True clicks

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay sometimes blocks dropdown option selection
ui_bugs.workaround: Use keyboard navigation or force clicks

passed_tests: Backend Entity CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend Bank Accounts with entity validation
Backend Cash Flows with entity_id requirement
Backend Linked Flows (batch creation and retrieval)
Frontend Dashboard initial load and KPI cards display
Frontend Entry Log dialog with search/filter functionality
Frontend Bank Accounts dialog with entity grouping
Frontend Quick Add form with entity selection
Frontend Advanced options (category, recurrence, linked flows)
Frontend Linked flows creation and submission
Entity selector with create option (keyboard navigation)
Form validation and reset after submission
Status explanation in KPI cards (Danger status with negative amount)
Proper entity associations in all components
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown overlay issues in EntitySelector and modal dialogs to improve click accessibility. Consider adding z-index adjustments or click event handling improvements.
